why_not_complete: Top-level fixed script-runner surfaces, stale deploy provider execution, browser deterministic-probe naming claims, fixture-eval production-readiness overclaims, red-team catalog-fixture overclaims, and Brain JSON snapshot overclaims are neutralized, but Manus-grade natural-language web-app agent readiness still requires independent production red-team/release evidence plus a real SQLite/dependency-backed Brain kernel.
